title: OPCraft
description: Adventure through dungeons, caves, and hidden structures, seeking out treasures. Optimize your gameplay and play with friends or solo.
body:
Bu modpack içeriğini biraz özetleyim

- yeni dekoratif öğeler için birçok mod
- yeni moblar
- daha verimli köyler 
- zor moblar 
- tatlı hayvanlar(bunları bir çoğunu yiyebilirsin :D)
- güzel manzaralar
- leziz yemekler
- yeni yapılar
- gizli sandıklar
- karakter üzerinde olsuşacak gerçekçi etkiler (biraz serinlemen gerekebilir :D)
- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Let me summarize the contents of this modpack. 

- New decorative elements for many modes
- New mobs
- More efficient villages
- Difficult mobs
- Cute animals (you can eat many of them :D)
- Beautiful landscapes
- Delicious food
- New structures
- Hidden chests
- Realistic effects on the character (you may need to cool down a bit :D)

BİG UPDATE(1.3.0):Your enjoyment of the game may vary, Various optimizations were made, more decorative items were added, mobs were made harder, and structures were added for more loot.
